claim: MUC1-C activates the NF-κB p65 signaling pathway by interacting with IκB kinase ß.
evidence_sentences: These findings indicate that MUC1 is important for physiological activation of IKKβ and that overexpression of MUC1, as found in human cancers, confers sustained induction of the IKKβ–NF-κB p65 pathway.

conditions: overexpression of MUC1 in human cancers
